active.brief:
Golden-hour composition — fill the frame with one strong subject:
• Pick a single clear subject (a tree, an animal, a fence line)
• Place it on a vertical third — don't show the whole scene
• Use the low warm light: side or backlight, watch your shadows
Success: one intentional frame where the subject dominates, not the scenery.
active.rationale:
Pattern: recent frames still cluster near center (composition ~5.4).
Why now: evening light rewards deliberate framing — build on your completed thirds drill.

completed.brief:
Use rule of thirds on your next outdoor frame — place the main subject on a vertical third, not dead center.
Success: one clear subject with intentional negative space.
completed.rationale:
Pattern: early library frames cluster near center (composition ~4.5).
Why now: baseline before the current composition drill.
